bead.title: doctor + docs: report both install layers and land skill-install-topology spec updates
bead.description:
PROBLEM (Principle 2 of epic ddx-602ae31a)
`ddx doctor` must surface both install tiers so operators can see whether a plugin is installed globally, per-project, or lazy-resolving to global. The governing spec/docs must also document the dual install topology and lookup precedence so the behavior is discoverable and durable.

ROOT CAUSE
- cli/cmd/doctor.go:418 `reportSkillInstallTopology(projectRoot)` computes a global path and a project path with statuses (doctor.go:436/441/444 `lazy-resolves-to-global`) and prints two lines at doctor.go:447-448: `Global Install (%s) — %s` and `Project Install (%s) — %s`. These lines lack a regression test.
- The dual-topology decision and precedence are not yet fully reflected in the spec/docs: ADR-027 (skill-install-topology), library/skills/ddx/SKILL.md "How this skill works", and CLAUDE.md "Persona System".

PROPOSED FIX
- Add a test asserting `ddx doctor` output contains both the `Global Install (` and `Project Install (` lines with a correct status (`ok` | `missing` | `lazy-resolves-to-global`) given seeded/absent tiers.
- Update docs/helix/02-design/adr/ADR-027-skill-install-topology.md to document install-to-agent (global) vs install-in-project (in-tree + convention) and the project→global→baked-in precedence.
- Update CLAUDE.md "Persona System" section to state the install precedence, and library/skills/ddx/SKILL.md "How this skill works" to document install locations. Land all spec/doc edits in this bead's commit.

NON-SCOPE
- Install/init/update behavioral changes — sibling beads (this bead consumes their behavior for the doctor report only).
- Removing the per-project install (both modes coexist).
- Migrating legacy ~/.config/ddx paths.
- Agent-harness path discovery beyond Claude Code and Codex.

DEPS
- ddx-06cbaa90 (ddx home resolution).
- Sibling install/update beads (doctor reports the layers they create); land this bead after they merge so the report reflects real behavior.
bead.acceptance:
1. TestDoctor_ReportsBothInstallLayers (cli/cmd/doctor_test.go): `ddx doctor` output contains a `Global Install (` line and a `Project Install (` line, each ending with a status of `ok`, `missing`, or `lazy-resolves-to-global`, matching the seeded/absent state of each tier.
2. Spec updates landed in this commit: docs/helix/02-design/adr/ADR-027-skill-install-topology.md documents global vs project install and project→global→baked-in precedence; CLAUDE.md "Persona System" states the install precedence; library/skills/ddx/SKILL.md "How this skill works" documents install locations.
3. cd cli && go test ./cmd/... green.
4. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
